title: A bit of a tight spot
display_title: A bit of a tight spot
wikitext:
[]: A bit of a tight spot.             Quote Post by tokenflipguy » Mon Feb 20, 2006 11:56 pm Hi, I am writting a research paper about the psychological aspects of Evangleion and like to know were there are full transcripts of the TV series. I tried this sites transcripts and I keep on getting 404 errors perhaps because of a server move. Can someone help me? Most appriciated...

[]:             Quote Post by Heidroch » Tue Feb 21, 2006 12:21 am Hey, you're that ninja....

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Feb 21, 2006 3:04 am Scripts Compendium: 1-26: http://plaza.harmonix.ne.jp/~onizuka/literal/evangelion.html 21'-24': http://www.reiliberationparade.com.ar/textos/scripts/dc/index.htm 25': http://www.evaotaku.com/html/AIR.html 26': http://www.evaotaku.com/html/Sincerely.html "27": http://eva.netroof.net/Base/Med-Radio.htm

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 21, 2006 10:38 am http://www.evamonkey.com/em_scripts.php

[]:             Quote Post by BLACKANGEL32076 » Sat Jul 01, 2006 1:23 am Bump, in case ya need it bud.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jul 01, 2006 1:31 am His arrival was innapropriately timed.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sat Jul 01, 2006 6:31 am The Eva Monkey wrote: His arrival was innapropriately timed.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jul 01, 2006 11:03 am Timesplitter 01 wrote: Although I wonder how he went with writing the paper.
